entry.content:
Jawas… filthy traders, but they do carry interesting items.

Do you need help with a Jawa figure or one of its accessories?

1 Jawa figure
2 Jawa blaster
3 Jawa cloak / cape
4 All of the above — guide me

You can reply with a number or describe it in your own words.

cape_question.content:
No problem. Start with the easiest visible thing.

What does your Jawa have?

1 Vinyl cape – smooth plastic
2 Cloth cloak – fabric
3 No cape or cloak

You can reply with a number or describe it in your own words.

cloth_decision.content:
A cloth cloaked Jawa. Got it.

Would you like to check:

1 Which cloak version you have
2 Whether the cloak looks original
3 Check which Jawa figure variant you have first

Reply with a number or just type your question in your own words.

vinyl_path.content:
Vinyl cape Jawa — good, that narrows things quickly.

Let’s identify the figure itself.

Next step:
Check the Country of Origin markings on the legs.

Reply with:

1 for Hong Kong
2 if it doesn't show Hong Kong
3 if you can't tell

coo_question.content:
Next step:
Check the Country of Origin markings on the legs.

Reply with:

1 for Hong Kong
2 if it doesn't show Hong Kong
3 if you can't tell / it doesn't appear to have either

hk_variants.content:
Here are the main Hong Kong Jawa variants.

Match your figure to one of these:

1 Kader M1
2 Kader M2
3 Unitoy M3
4 Unitoy / Lili Ledy M4

Full guide:
https://www.variantvillain.com/characters/jawa/

Reply with 1, 2, 3 or 4.

offer_blaster.content:
Do you also want help checking the Jawa blaster?

Reply with:

1 Yes, help me identify the blaster
2 No, I’m done for now

cloak_version.content:
Cloth cloak versions can vary slightly in cut, stitching and material.

Best approach is to compare with reference images:
https://www.variantvillain.com/characters/jawa/

If you want, describe what you see and I’ll guide you further.

cloak_auth.content:
To check if the cloak is original:

• Look for ageing and wear
• Check stitching style
• Compare fabric texture carefully

Reference:
https://www.variantvillain.com/characters/jawa/

If unsure, describe it and I’ll help narrow it down.

non_hk.content:
Non-Hong Kong Jawas are less common.

Best step is to compare markings and sculpt against reference:
https://www.variantvillain.com/characters/jawa/

coo_unknown.content:
If you can’t see markings, try checking under strong light or magnification.

If still unclear, describe what you can see and I’ll guide you.

end.content: If you have anything else you want to check, just ask.
